zh.Raith House, Fife, Scotland: 蘇格蘭費伏萊斯 豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Melville於1413年出生在蘇格蘭費伏萊斯 豪斯時，她的父親Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith29歲，母親Marjory Scott24歲。她於1436年6月29日與David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪享年94歲。

zh-hans.Raith House, Fife, Scotland: 苏格兰費伏萊斯 豪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Melville于1413年出生在苏格兰費伏萊斯 豪斯时，她的父亲Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith29岁，母亲Marjory Scott24岁。她于1436年6月29日与David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Melville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the various places in Normandy called Malleville, from Latin mala ‘bad’ + ville ‘settlement’.
Irish (mainly Ulster): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Maoilmhichíl ‘descendant of Maoilmhichil’, a personal name meaning ‘devotee of (Saint) Michael’.

History: The American novelist Herman Melville (1819–91) was a descendantof the Scottish Melvilles. His maternal grandfather was the revolutionary war general Peter Gansevoort (born 1749 in Albany, NY). His paternal grandfather was Maj. Thomas Melville of Boston. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Maol Mhichíl, a chief of Síol Muireadhaigh (County Roscommon) in the 9th century.

variants.name: Melvin
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of Melville with alternation of final -l and -n.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhín ‘descendant of the devotee of Maoilmhín’, a personal name meaning ‘gentle chieftain’.

variants.name: Mellin
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so called.

variants.name: Mulvihill
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoil Mhichíl ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Michael’. The Anglicized form was sometimes abbreviated into Melville .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Melville was born in 1413, in Raith House, Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith, was 29 and her mother, Marjory Scott, was 24. She married David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell on 29 June 1436. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1507, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Melville est née en 1413, à Raith House, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marjory Scott, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell le 29 juin 1436. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1507, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Melville 1413 in Raith House, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith 29 und ihre Mutter Marjory Scott 24. Sie hat am 29. Juni 1436 David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1507 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Melville è nata il nel 1413 nel Raith House, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Marjory Scott, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell il 29 giugno 1436. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1507, nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Melvilleが1413年にスコットランドフィフレイス ホーウゼで生まれた時，父Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raithは29歳，母Marjory Scottは24歳であった。1436年6月29日にDavid Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Melville(이)가 1413년 스컷랜드 피프 레이스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory Scott(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1436년 6월 29일 David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 스컷랜드 피프 커k캘디에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Loch Leven Castle, Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Melville nasceu em 1413, em Raith House, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Scott, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell em 29 de junho de 1436. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1507, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Melville родилась в 1413 г. в местности реит хоус, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Scott, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell 29 июня 1436 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1507 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Melville nació en 1413, en Raith House, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Melville - Second Lord of Raith, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marjory Scott, tenía 24 años. Se casó con David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell el 29 de junio de 1436. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1507, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 94 años.
